requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Kahramaa Solar PV Grid-Connection Specification
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——Kahramaa太阳能光伏并网规格
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——Kahramaa太陽能光伏併網規格

summary.en: Kahramaa's Technical Specifications for the Connection of Solar PV Systems to the Network (document EP-EPP-P7-S1) explicitly references IEC 62109-2 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) as a required standard for solar PV inverters connected to the Qatar grid. IEC 62109-1 (Part 1: General requirements) is the parent standard and is implicitly applicable because Part 2 requirements cannot be assessed independently. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected by project owners and procurement specifications for utility-scale and Be Solar distributed projects.
summary.zh: Kahramaa《太阳能光伏系统接入电网技术规格》（文件EP-EPP-P7-S1）明确引用IEC 62109-2（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）作为接入卡塔尔电网的太阳能光伏逆变器的必要标准。IEC 62109-1（第1部分：通用要求）为母标准，由于第2部分要求不能独立评估，故隐含适用。公用事业规模及Be Solar分布式项目的项目业主和采购规格通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据。
summary.zht: Kahramaa《太陽能光伏系統接入電網技術規格》（文件EP-EPP-P7-S1）明確引用IEC 62109-2（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）作為接入卡達電網的太陽能光伏逆變器的必要標準。IEC 62109-1（第1部分：通用要求）為母標準，由於第2部分要求不能獨立評估，故隱含適用。公用事業規模及Be Solar分散式項目的項目業主和採購規格通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (implicitly applicable as parent standard)
Kahramaa Technical Specifications for the Connection of Solar PV Systems to Network — EP-EPP-P7-S1

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by Kahramaa or Qatar project owners as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被Kahramaa或卡塔尔项目业主接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被Kahramaa或卡達項目業主接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy Kahramaa's IEC 62109-2 type-test requirement for Qatar grid-connection. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to the Qatar project. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for Kahramaa project review or Be Solar equipment approval.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足Kahramaa卡塔尔并网的IEC 62109-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至卡塔尔项目的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交Kahramaa项目审查或Be Solar设备审批所需设备文件前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足Kahramaa卡達併網的IEC 62109-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至卡達項目的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交Kahramaa項目審查或Be Solar設備審批所需設備文件前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Kahramaa grid-connection project submission where Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1 applies; mandatory in practice for Be Solar distributed solar projects and utility-scale project procurement specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

source.publisher: Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy Kahramaa's IEC 62109-2 grid-connection requirement. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for Qatar project review. Verify current Kahramaa specification version and model-family coverage requirements directly with Kahramaa or the appointed project engineer before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足Kahramaa的IEC 62109-2并网要求。请在提交卡塔尔项目审查设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接向Kahramaa或指定项目工程师核实现行Kahramaa规格版本及型号系列覆盖要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足Kahramaa的IEC 62109-2併網要求。請在提交卡達項目審查設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向Kahramaa或指定項目工程師核實現行Kahramaa規格版本及型號系列覆蓋要求。
